name: Skillet Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 lb ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
3 cups No Yolks® egg noodle substitute, uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, heat oil over medium flame.
2. Add chicken, onions, and bell peppers. Cook until the chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
3. Sprinkle half of the spaghetti sauce mix over the chicken mixture.
4. Spoon cottage cheese over the chicken mixture.
5. Top with egg noodle substitute in a layer.
6. Sprinkle remaining spaghetti sauce mix on top.
7. Stir in basil and parsley.
8. Pour crushed tomatoes, tomato sauce, and water over the top, ensuring everything is moistened.
9. Cover and simmer over low flame for 35 minutes or until noodles are done.
10. Sprinkle with cheese before serving. Let set for 5 minutes before serving.
